controls.control_objective: To ensure be outsourced
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be outsourced

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative
Banks - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all rural co-operative banks, hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rcbs' and individually as an 'rcb'
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to all Rural Co-operative Banks, hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'RCBs' and individually as an 'RCB'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all rural co-operative banks, hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rcbs' and individually as an 'rcb'

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to outsourcing of activities unrelated to banking services like usage of courier, catering of staff, housekeeping and janitorial services, secur
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall not apply to outsourcing of activities unrelated to banking
services like usage of courier, catering of staff, housekeeping and janitorial services,
security of the premises, movement and archiving of records.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to outsourcing of activities unrelated to banking services like usage of courier, catering of staff, housekeeping and janitorial services, secur

controls.control_objective: To ensure include agreements for a limited period
controls.control_description: 'Continuing basis' shall include agreements for a limited period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include agreements for a limited period

controls.control_objective: To ensure arrangements, which if disrupted, have the potential to significantly impact the business operations, reputation, or profitability of an rcb
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Material Outsourcing' means arrangements, which if disrupted, have the
potential to significantly impact the business operations, reputation, or profitability
of an RCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to arrangements, which if disrupted, have the potential to significantly impact the business operations, reputation, or profitability of an rcb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on the:
controls.control_description: 'Materiality' of outsourcing shall be based on the:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on the:

controls.control_objective: To ensure the service provider fail to perform the service
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the service provider fail to perform the service

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the companies act
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank
of India Act, 1934 or the Companies Act, 2013 and Rules made thereunder, or any
statutory modification or re-enactment thereto, or Glossary of Terms published by
RBI or as used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the companies act

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a comprehensive board-approved outsourcing policy, the coverage of which is indicated in paragraph 16
controls.control_description:
An RCB intending to outsource any of its financial services shall put in place a
comprehensive Board-approved outsourcing policy, the coverage of which is
indicated in paragraph 16.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a comprehensive board-approved outsourcing policy, the coverage of which is indicated in paragraph 16

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for putting in place a framework to evaluate the risks and materiality of all existing and prospective outsourcing arrangements, laying
controls.control_description:
The Board shall be responsible for putting in place a framework to evaluate the risks
and materiality of all existing and prospective outsourcing arrangements, laying
down appropriate approval authorities depending on risks and materiality, and
undertaking regular review.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be responsible for putting in place a framework to evaluate the risks and materiality of all existing and prospective outsourcing arrangements, laying

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible, inter alia, for:
controls.control_description: It shall be responsible, inter alia, for:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible, inter alia, for:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be outsourced
controls.control_description: Activities that shall not be outsourced
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be outsourced

controls.control_objective: To ensure however not outsource core management functions including policy formulation, internal audit and compliance, compliance with kyc norms, credit sanctio
controls.control_description:
An RCB which chooses to outsource financial services shall however not outsource
core management functions including policy formulation, Internal Audit and
compliance, compliance with KYC norms, credit sanction, and management of
investment portfolio.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to however not outsource core management functions including policy formulation, internal audit and compliance, compliance with kyc norms, credit sanctio

controls.control_objective: To ensure with respect to internal audit
controls.control_description:
Provided that with respect to Internal Audit, where required, experts, including
former employees, could be hired on a contractual basis subject to:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to with respect to internal audit

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval from rbi / nabard
controls.control_description:
An RCB, which desires to outsource financial services, shall not require prior
approval from RBI / NABARD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval from rbi / nabard

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to on- site / off-site monitoring and inspection / scrutiny, by rbi / nabard
controls.control_description:
However, such arrangements shall be subject to on-
site / off-site monitoring and inspection / scrutiny, by RBI / NABARD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to on- site / off-site monitoring and inspection / scrutiny, by rbi / nabard

controls.control_objective: To ensure diminish its obligations including to its customers and rbi / nabard, and those of its board and md / ceo along with the senior management, who have t
controls.control_description:
As stated in paragraph 8 of these Directions, the outsourcing of any activity by an
RCB shall not diminish its obligations including to its customers and RBI / NABARD,
and those of its Board and MD / CEO along with the Senior Management, who have
the ultimate responsibility for the outsourced activity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to diminish its obligations including to its customers and rbi / nabard, and those of its board and md / ceo along with the senior management, who have t

controls.control_objective: To ensure , therefore, be responsible for the actions of its service provider including business correspondent (bc) and its retail outlets / sub-agents and the
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall, therefore, be
responsible for the actions of its service provider including Business Correspondent
(BC) and its retail outlets / sub-agents and the confidentiality of information
pertaining to the customers that is available with the service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , therefore, be responsible for the actions of its service provider including business correspondent (bc) and its retail outlets / sub-agents and the

controls.control_objective: To ensure retain ultimate control of the outsourced activity
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall
retain ultimate control of the outsourced activity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to retain ultimate control of the outsourced activity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be owned or controlled by any director or officer / employee of the rcb or their relatives having the same meaning as assigned under companies act, 20
controls.control_description:
(vi) the service provider shall not be owned or controlled by any director or officer /
employee of the RCB or their relatives having the same meaning as assigned
under Companies Act, 2013 and the Rules framed thereunder, as amended
from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be owned or controlled by any director or officer / employee of the rcb or their relatives having the same meaning as assigned under companies act, 20

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for filing currency transactions reports (ctrs) and suspicious transactions reports (strs) to fiu or any other competent authority in r
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall be responsible for filing Currency Transactions Reports (CTRs) and
Suspicious Transactions Reports (STRs) to FIU or any other competent authority in
respect of its customer related activities carried out by the service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for filing currency transactions reports (ctrs) and suspicious transactions reports (strs) to fiu or any other competent authority in r

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a comprehensive outsourcing policy, approved by its board, which shall incorporate, inter alia, the following:
controls.control_description:
An RCB intending to outsource any of its financial services shall put in place a
comprehensive outsourcing policy, approved by its Board, which shall incorporate,
inter alia, the following:
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a comprehensive outsourcing policy, approved by its board, which shall incorporate, inter alia, the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, be responsible for:
controls.control_description:
The MD / CEO and Senior Management of an RCB shall, inter alia, be responsible
for:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, be responsible for:

controls.control_objective: To ensure evaluate and guard against the following key risks when entering into outsourcing arrangements:
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall evaluate and guard against the following key risks when entering into
outsourcing arrangements:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to evaluate and guard against the following key risks when entering into outsourcing arrangements:

controls.control_objective: To ensure arise due to technology failure, fraud, error, or inadequate financial capacity of the service provider to fulfil obligations or to provide remedies
controls.control_description:
(iv) Operational Risk - which may arise due to technology failure, fraud, error, or
inadequate financial capacity of the service provider to fulfil obligations or to
provide remedies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to arise due to technology failure, fraud, error, or inadequate financial capacity of the service provider to fulfil obligations or to provide remedies

controls.control_objective: To ensure arise when an rcb becomes overly reliant on one service provider, loses relevant internal skills preventing it from bringing the activity back in-hous
controls.control_description:
(vi) Exit Strategy Risk - may arise when an RCB becomes overly reliant on one
service provider, loses relevant internal skills preventing it from bringing the
activity back in-house, or enters into contracts that make speedy exits
prohibitively expensive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to arise when an rcb becomes overly reliant on one service provider, loses relevant internal skills preventing it from bringing the activity back in-hous

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the ability to enforce the contract with the service provider
controls.control_description:
(ix) Contractual Risk - where the RCB may not have the ability to enforce the
contract with the service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the ability to enforce the contract with the service provider

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek to ensure the security, preservation, and protection of the customer information in the custody of the service provider
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall seek to ensure the security, preservation, and protection of the
customer information in the custody of the service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek to ensure the security, preservation, and protection of the customer information in the custody of the service provider

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on a 'need to know' basis, i
controls.control_description:
Access to customer information by a service provider or its staff shall be on a 'need
to know' basis, i.e., limited to those areas where the information is required in order
to perform the outsourced function.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on a 'need to know' basis, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure review and monitor the security practices and control processes of its service providers on a regular basis and require the service provider to disclo
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall review and monitor the security practices and control processes of its
service providers on a regular basis and require the service provider to disclose
security breaches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review and monitor the security practices and control processes of its service providers on a regular basis and require the service provider to disclo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken to build strong safeguards so that there is no comingling or combining of information, documents, records, and assets
controls.control_description:
In instances, where a service provider acts as an outsourcing agent for multiple
entities, care shall be taken to build strong safeguards so that there is no comingling
or combining of information, documents, records, and assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken to build strong safeguards so that there is no comingling or combining of information, documents, records, and assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that its service providers are able to isolate and clearly identify the rcb's customer information, documents, records, and assets to protect t
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall ensure that its service providers are able to isolate and clearly identify
the RCB's customer information, documents, records, and assets to protect the
confidentiality of the information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that its service providers are able to isolate and clearly identify the rcb's customer information, documents, records, and assets to protect t

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately notify rbi / nabard in the event of breach of security and leakage of confidential customer related information
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall immediately notify RBI / NABARD in the event of breach of security
and leakage of confidential customer related information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to immediately notify rbi / nabard in the event of breach of security and leakage of confidential customer related information

controls.control_objective: To ensure be liable to its customers for any damage
controls.control_description:
In these eventualities, the
RCB shall be liable to its customers for any damage.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be liable to its customers for any damage

controls.control_objective: To ensure perform appropriate due diligence while considering or renewing an outsourcing arrangement, to assess the capability of the service provider to comply
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall perform appropriate due diligence while considering or renewing an
outsourcing arrangement, to assess the capability of the service provider to comply
with obligations in the outsourcing agreement on an ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to perform appropriate due diligence while considering or renewing an outsourcing arrangement, to assess the capability of the service provider to comply

controls.control_objective: To ensure involve an evaluation of all available information, as applicable, about the service provider, including but not limited to: <image>
controls.control_description:
The due diligence mentioned above shall involve an evaluation of all available
information, as applicable, about the service provider, including but not limited to:
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to involve an evaluation of all available information, as applicable, about the service provider, including but not limited to: <image>

controls.control_objective: To ensure impact data security and service performance
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to impact data security and service performance

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain independent reviews and market feedback on the service provider to supplement the findings of its own due diligence
controls.control_description:
Where possible, an RCB shall obtain independent reviews and market feedback on
the service provider to supplement the findings of its own due diligence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain independent reviews and market feedback on the service provider to supplement the findings of its own due diligence

controls.control_objective: To ensure also evaluate whether the systems of its service provider are compatible with those of the rcb and acceptability of standards of performance including
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall also evaluate whether the systems of its service provider are
compatible with those of the RCB and acceptability of standards of performance
including in the area of customer service.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also evaluate whether the systems of its service provider are compatible with those of the rcb and acceptability of standards of performance including

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the terms and conditions governing the outsourcing arrangement are carefully defined in written agreements and vetted by the rcb's legal c
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall ensure that the terms and conditions governing the outsourcing
arrangement are carefully defined in written agreements and vetted by the RCB's
legal counsel on their legal effect and enforceability.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the terms and conditions governing the outsourcing arrangement are carefully defined in written agreements and vetted by the rcb's legal c

controls.control_objective: To ensure appropriately reckon the associated risks and the strategies for mitigating or <image> managing them
controls.control_description:
The agreement shall
appropriately reckon the associated risks and the strategies for mitigating or
<image>
managing them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appropriately reckon the associated risks and the strategies for mitigating or <image> managing them

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that such an agreement is sufficiently flexible to allow the rcb to retain an appropriate level of control over the outsourcing, and the right
controls.control_description:
The RCB shall ensure that such an agreement is sufficiently flexible
to allow the RCB to retain an appropriate level of control over the outsourcing, and
the right to intervene with appropriate measures to meet legal and regulatory
obligations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that such an agreement is sufficiently flexible to allow the rcb to retain an appropriate level of control over the outsourcing, and the right

controls.control_objective: To ensure also bring out the nature of legal relationship between the parties, i
controls.control_description:
The agreement shall also bring out the nature of legal relationship
between the parties, i.e., whether agent-principal or otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also bring out the nature of legal relationship between the parties, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure include:
controls.control_description: Some of the key provisions of the agreement shall include:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include:

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly formalise the performance criteria to measure the quality and quantity of service levels
controls.control_description:
SLAs shall clearly formalise the performance criteria to measure the quality and
quantity of service levels;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly formalise the performance criteria to measure the quality and quantity of service levels

controls.control_objective: To ensure review the subcontracting arrangement and ensure that these arrangements are compliant with these directions
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review the subcontracting arrangement and ensure that these arrangements are compliant with these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained even after the contract expires, or gets terminated
controls.control_description:
(xi) provision that confidentiality of customers' information shall be maintained even
after the contract expires, or gets terminated;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained even after the contract expires, or gets terminated

controls.control_objective: To ensure have in place a management structure to monitor and control its outsourced activities and shall ensure that outsourcing agreements with service provid
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall have in place a management structure to monitor and control its
outsourced activities and shall ensure that outsourcing agreements with service
providers contain provisions to address the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have in place a management structure to monitor and control its outsourced activities and shall ensure that outsourcing agreements with service provid

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain a central record of all material outsourcing of financial services for review by its board and md / ceo along with the senior management
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall maintain a central record of all material outsourcing of financial
services for review by its Board and MD / CEO along with the Senior Management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain a central record of all material outsourcing of financial services for review by its board and md / ceo along with the senior management

controls.control_objective: To ensure be updated promptly, and half yearly reviews shall be placed before the board
controls.control_description:
The records shall be updated promptly, and half yearly reviews shall be placed
before the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be updated promptly, and half yearly reviews shall be placed before the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure assess the adequacy of the risk management practices adopted in overseeing and managing the outsourcing arrangement, the rcb's compliance with its ris
controls.control_description:
Regular audits, at least annually, by either the internal auditors or external auditors
of an RCB shall assess the adequacy of the risk management practices adopted in
overseeing and managing the outsourcing arrangement, the RCB's compliance with
its risk management framework, and the requirements of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assess the adequacy of the risk management practices adopted in overseeing and managing the outsourcing arrangement, the rcb's compliance with its ris

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at least on an annual basis, review the financial and operational condition of the service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its ou
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall, at least on an annual basis, review the financial and operational
condition of the service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its
outsourcing obligations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at least on an annual basis, review the financial and operational condition of the service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its ou

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on all available information about the service provider, shall highlight any deterioration or <image> breach in performance standards, confid
controls.control_description:
Such due diligence reviews, which shall be based on all
available information about the service provider, shall highlight any deterioration or
<image>
breach in performance standards, confidentiality, and security, and in operational
resilience or business continuity preparedness.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on all available information about the service provider, shall highlight any deterioration or <image> breach in performance standards, confid

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that reconciliation of transactions between itself and the service provider (and its subcontractors) are carried out as advised in rbi guidelin
controls.control_description:
In such cases, the RCB shall ensure that
reconciliation of transactions between itself and the service provider (and its
subcontractors) are carried out as advised in RBI guidelines on Outsourcing of Cash
Management - Reconciliation of Transactions' dated May 14, 2019, as applicable
and as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that reconciliation of transactions between itself and the service provider (and its subcontractors) are carried out as advised in rbi guidelin

controls.control_objective: To ensure require its service providers to develop and establish a robust framework for documenting, maintaining, and testing business continuity and recovery p
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall require its service providers to develop and establish a robust
framework for documenting, maintaining, and testing business continuity and
recovery procedures.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to require its service providers to develop and establish a robust framework for documenting, maintaining, and testing business continuity and recovery p

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the service provider periodically tests the business continuity and recovery plan and may also consider joint testing and recovery exercis
controls.control_description:
It shall ensure that the service provider periodically tests the
Business Continuity and Recovery Plan and may also consider joint testing and
recovery exercises with its service provider at mutually agreed frequency, but at
least annually.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the service provider periodically tests the business continuity and recovery plan and may also consider joint testing and recovery exercis

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider the availability of alternative service providers or the possibility of bringing the outsourced activity back in-house in an emergency, and t
controls.control_description:
In establishing a viable contingency plan, an RCB shall consider the availability of
alternative service providers or the possibility of bringing the outsourced activity back
in-house in an emergency, and the costs, time and resources that would be
involved.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider the availability of alternative service providers or the possibility of bringing the outsourced activity back in-house in an emergency, and t

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that its service providers are able to isolate the rcb's information, documents, and records, and other assets so that in adverse conditions or
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall ensure that its service providers are able to isolate the RCB's
information, documents, and records, and other assets so that in adverse conditions
or termination of the agreement, all documents, records of transactions and
information given to the service provider and assets of the RCB can be removed
from the possession of the service provider (in order to enable the RCB to continue
its business operations), deleted, destroyed, or rendered unusable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that its service providers are able to isolate the rcb's information, documents, and records, and other assets so that in adverse conditions or

controls.control_objective: To ensure retain an appropriate level of control over its outsourcing arrangement along with the right to intervene with appropriate measures to continue its bu
controls.control_description:
In order to mitigate the risk of unexpected termination of the outsourcing agreement
or insolvency or liquidation of its service provider, an RCB shall retain an appropriate
level of control over its outsourcing arrangement along with the right to intervene
with appropriate measures to continue its business operations without incurring
<image>
prohibitive expenses and disruption in the operations of the RCB and its services to
the customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to retain an appropriate level of control over its outsourcing arrangement along with the right to intervene with appropriate measures to continue its bu

controls.control_objective: To ensure :
controls.control_description: If the services of a service provider are terminated by an RCB, then it shall:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to :

controls.control_objective: To ensure only be entered into with parties operating in jurisdictions that uphold confidentiality agreements and clauses
controls.control_description:
In principle, outsourcing arrangements shall only be entered into with parties
operating in jurisdictions that uphold confidentiality agreements and clauses
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only be entered into with parties operating in jurisdictions that uphold confidentiality agreements and clauses

controls.control_objective: To ensure :
controls.control_description: While engaging with service provider(s) in a foreign country, an RCB shall:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to :

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by both, these directions and the host country guidelines, and in case there are differences, the more stringent of the two shall prevail
controls.control_description:
The overseas outsourcing operations of an RCB shall be governed by both, these
Directions and the host country guidelines, and in case there are differences, the
more stringent of the two shall prevail.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be governed by both, these directions and the host country guidelines, and in case there are differences, the more stringent of the two shall prevail

controls.control_objective: To ensure prevail
controls.control_description:
However, where there is any conflict, the host
country guidelines shall prevail.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prevail

controls.control_objective: To ensure affect the rights of its customers against the rcb, including the ability of the customers to obtain redressal as applicable under relevant laws
controls.control_description:
Outsourcing arrangements entered into by an RCB shall not affect the rights of its
customers against the RCB, including the ability of the customers to obtain redressal
as applicable under relevant laws.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to affect the rights of its customers against the rcb, including the ability of the customers to obtain redressal as applicable under relevant laws

controls.control_objective: To ensure incorporate a clause in the corresponding product literature, and brochures, stating that services of the service provider, including in sales, and ma
controls.control_description:
In cases where customers are required to deal with a service provider in the process
of dealing with an RCB, it shall incorporate a clause in the corresponding product
literature, and brochures, stating that services of the service provider, including in
sales, and marketing, of the products may be used.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to incorporate a clause in the corresponding product literature, and brochures, stating that services of the service provider, including in sales, and ma

controls.control_objective: To ensure be indicated in broad terms
controls.control_description:
The role of the service provider
may be indicated in broad terms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be indicated in broad terms

controls.control_objective: To ensure be compromised in any manner on account of outsourcing, i
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall have a robust grievance redressal mechanism that shall not be
compromised in any manner on account of outsourcing, i.e., responsibility for
redressal of customers' grievances related to outsourced services shall rest with the
RCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be compromised in any manner on account of outsourcing, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accountable <image> for inappropriate behaviour by its employees or employees of the outsourced agency and shall provide timely grievance redressal
controls.control_description:
In case of microfinance loans, a declaration that the RCB shall be accountable
<image>
for inappropriate behaviour by its employees or employees of the outsourced agency
and shall provide timely grievance redressal, shall be made in the loan agreement,
and in the Fair Practices Code (FPC) displayed in its office / branch premises /
website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accountable <image> for inappropriate behaviour by its employees or employees of the outsourced agency and shall provide timely grievance redressal

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute grievance redressal machinery in accordance with the provisions of reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - responsible business c
controls.control_description:
(i) an RCB shall constitute Grievance Redressal Machinery in accordance with the
provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks - Responsible
Business Conduct) Directions, 2025 and give wide publicity about it within the
bank through electronic and print media and also by placing the information on its
website;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute grievance redressal machinery in accordance with the provisions of reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - responsible business c

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made known and widely publicised
controls.control_description:
(ii) the name and contact number of designated grievance redressal officer of the
RCB shall be made known and widely publicised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made known and widely publicised

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that genuine grievances of customers are redressed promptly without involving delay
controls.control_description:
The designated officer shall
ensure that genuine grievances of customers are redressed promptly without
involving delay.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that genuine grievances of customers are redressed promptly without involving delay

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly indicated that rcb's grievance redressal machinery will also deal with the issues relating to services provided by the service provider
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly indicated that rcb's grievance redressal machinery will also deal with the issues relating to services provided by the service provider

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed on the rcb's website
controls.control_description:
(iii) the grievance redressal procedure of the RCB and the time frame for responding
to the complaints (maximum 30 days) shall be placed on the RCB's website;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed on the rcb's website

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option of approaching the consumer education and protection cell (cepc) of respective regional office of rbi for redressal of their grievance
controls.control_description:
(iv) if a complaint is rejected wholly or partly by an RCB, and the complainant is not
satisfied with the reply or does not get any reply within 30 days, after the RCB
received the complaint, the complainant shall have the option of approaching the
Consumer Education and Protection Cell (CEPC) of respective Regional Office of
RBI for redressal of their grievance(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option of approaching the consumer education and protection cell (cepc) of respective regional office of rbi for redressal of their grievance

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed
prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
